title: PI-Updater
subtitle: Automated update and deployment system for remote devices
description: A system designed to manage and deploy updates across distributed or remote devices.
Focused on maintaining consistency, simplifying updates, and reducing manual intervention.
features: Designed to integrate with existing systems like PI-Panic
Supports incremental refinement and controlled rollouts

progressNotes: Initial concept and update workflow design (Late 2025)
Defined system for managing updates across multiple devices.
Planned version tracking and deployment structure.
Outlined integration with existing device systems.
Core update system development (Late 2025 to Early 2026)
Built update distribution and synchronization logic.
Developed core structure for pushing updates to devices.
Integrated updater with existing systems and workflows.
Tested update delivery across multiple devices.
Refining update process and improving stability.
Expanding functionality and integration with other tools.
